response.justification: Szabo brings rare AI-agent infrastructure expertise combined with solid full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React credentials across 6+ years at senior level. His architectural depth (Staff roles, microservices experience, open-source platform leadership) supports expectations for architecture contributions. Key gaps include unverified knowledge of specific required frameworks (Nest.js, Vitest, Playwright), no demonstrated security/auth systems experience, and an unexplained 8-month career gap that requires clarification before assessment.
